rulings.Case Title: 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC, VS. ANDREW LINTON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 5, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT moot.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC, VS. ANDREW LINTON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 5, 2017 line 1. CROSS DEFENDANT 1429 GRANT AVE, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Cross-Complainant to (1) attach the operative Rental Agreement/Lease under the circumstances of the case the legal effect of the rental agreement for a four unit building cannot be sufficiently alleged; (2) for Cross-Complainant to allege facts regarding standing to pursue this action in light of the judgment entered on June 5, 2017 in case 553411; (3) for Cross-Complainant to allege facts establishing which claims remain against the cross-defendants in light for the Stipulation for Entry of Judgment with cross-defendants' alleged predecessor-in-interest in action 553411; (4) for Cross-Complainant to allege facts giving rise to applicability of Rent Ordinance to particular unit/units in the Building. The Court does not reach other grounds for demurrer at this time. They may be raised later, if appropriate. The Court takes judicial notice of filings in action 553411. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FIDENCIO MATEO VS. JULIAN F GONZALEZ
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 5, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANT JULIAN GONZALEZ's MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, action reported settled.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. KIM MCKENNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 5, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant to provide verified responses and responsive documents in possession and control of Defendant and Defendant's agents and a privilege log, if any documents are subject to asserted privilege. Responses, documents, and log to be delivered to Plaintiff's counsel within 10 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,460.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. DORETHA HOGAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 5, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT DORETHA HOGAN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND GRANTED. Defendant shall file answer no later than September 5, 2017 by 4:00 p.m.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: J&N INTERNATIONAL ENTERPRISES, LLC VS. ALICIA FLORES ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 5, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANT ALICIA FLORES's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint states sufficient facts to support an unlawful detainer for non-payment of rent. Complaint is not uncertain.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JIM JOHNSON VS. LISA BLACKWELL ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Lisa Blackwell'S Application To Restore Possession
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 5, 2017 line 7. Defendant Lisa Blackwell'S Application To Restore Possession Hearing Required.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARY ELIZABETH INN VS. COLLEEN BOODLEMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Continue Mandatory Settlement Conference And Trial
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 5, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT COLLEEN BOODLEMAN's Motion To Continue Mandatory Settlement Conference And Trial Hearing Required. Defendant to present (1) Proof of Service for the Motion; and (2) Present a letter from a doctor addressing why Defendant cannot participate in this action the weeks of September 4 and September 11,2017 provided that she attends the appointments on September 6 and September 11, 2017; how and why Defendant will be able to proceed with this action in November but not in September; and why Defendant cannot participate in the action at any time between September 12, 2017 and November 15, 2017.= (501/REQ)
